info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Transaction Processing API
info.description: The Transaction Processing API allows businesses to execute financial transactions efficiently and securely. This API supports various transaction types including payments, refunds, and adjustments. It is designed for use by financial institutions, e-commerce platforms, and service providers seeking to facilitate seamless monetary exchanges. Integration with this API enables consumers to manage their transaction workflows and enhance customer experiences.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to create a new financial transaction within the system. It requires specific transaction details and responds with the created transaction's information.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to initiate a new transaction. It should include all required fields necessary to process the transaction, following the defined schema. Ensure that you follow the correct format and provide valid data.

200.description: Request completed successfully, transaction details returned.

500.description: Internal server error occurred while processing the request.

404.description: Requested resource not found, transaction ID may be invalid.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Response

transactionId.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.

customerId.description: The identifier for the customer associated with the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction is made.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal).

amount.description: The amount of money involved in the transaction.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction is denominated.

status.description: The current status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending).

message.description: A descriptive message regarding the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the response of a successful transaction operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Error Response for Transaction Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred, formatted as an ISO 8601 string.

status.description: Indicates whether the transaction operation was successful or not.

error.description: A brief description of the error encountered.

message.description: A message providing more details about the error.
message.example: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

path.description: The request path that caused the error.

trace.description: A detailed trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion for resolving the error.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the error response returned when a transaction operation fails.

example.message: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

details.message: Payment gateway timeout while processing transaction request.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.title: Error Details

service.description: The name of the service that encountered the error.

errorCode.description: The error code representing the specific error type.

message.description: A message providing further context about the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.description: Detailed information about the error that occurred.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Request

customerId.description: Unique identifier for the customer initiating the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction amount will be debited.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction being performed (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, transfer).

amount.description: The amount of money to be transacted, represented as a string.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction amount is specified (e.g., USD, EUR).

beneficiaryAccount.description: The account number of the beneficiary in a transfer transaction.

transactionDate.description: The date when the transaction is to be executed, in ISO 8601 format.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the request body for creating a transaction operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Operation 404 Response

timestamp.description: The timestamp indicating when the error occurred.

status.description: A boolean status indicating the success or failure of the operation.

message.example: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace of the error for debugging purposes.

suggestion.description: A suggestion on what the user could do next to resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: This schema represents the detailed structure of a 404 error response for transaction operations.

example.message: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

details.message: No active account exists for the provided account number.

example.suggestion: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Trans.title: Transaction Error Details

accountNumber.description: The account number associated with the transaction error.

errorCode.description: A specific error code representing the type of error.

message.description: A user-friendly message describing the error.
message.example: No account found with the specified number.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Trans.description: This schema contains additional details regarding the transaction error.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.
